indicator_description: Rider-facing weather forecast plots for the Kluane Chilkat International Bike Relay. Plots show expected temperature, rain, wind effect, and gusts along the route.
title: KCIBR weather forecast for a 11-hour rider
subtitle: 11-hour rider
description: Race-day weather guidance along the KCIBR route. The upper panel shows temperature and rain near the rider's estimated arrival time. The lower panels show wind effect and gusts every 10 km. Timing assumes a constant average pace for the selected finish time.
